name: Baked Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the upper one-quarter of the tomatoes.
2. Remove the seeds with a spoon.
3. Sprinkle inside with a little salt and pepper and turn the tomatoes upside down to drain.
4. Make the roux: Melt butter until foamy, stir in mushrooms and cook until the liquid has evaporated. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
5. Stir in milk and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Blend the egg yolk into the mixture.
7. Stuff the tomatoes with this cream and place them in a baking dish.
8. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until heated through. Turn the heat to broil and bake until the top is golden brown.
